experiment_title: Sodium Reaction with Water and Phenolphthalein Observation

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="Sodium Reaction with Water and Phenolphthalein Observation" goal="To observe and analyze the reaction of metallic sodium with water containing phenolphthalein, identify the products formed, and record the physical and chemical changes including gas evolution and color change." difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="beaker_1" type="beaker" capacity="250ml" />
      <Component id="graduated_cylinder_1" type="graduated_cylinder" capacity="100ml" />
      <Component id="dropper_1" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="tweezers_1" type="tweezers" />
      <Component id="filter_paper_1" type="filter_paper" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="Distilled_Water" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Phenolphthalein_Solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Metallic_Sodium" state="solid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="graduated_cylinder_1" reagent="H2O" volume="50 mL" id="step_0" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="graduated_cylinder_1" to_vessel="beaker_1" volume="50 mL" id="step_1" />
      <Add vessel="beaker_1" reagent="C20H14O4" volume="2 mL" tool="dropper_1" id="step_2" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_3" />
      <MeasureMass reagent="Na" id="step_4" />
      <Add vessel="filter_paper_1" reagent="Na" mass="0.05 g" id="step_5" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_6" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="filter_paper_1" to_vessel="beaker_1" tool="tweezers_1" id="step_7" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_8" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>
